testcase.name: nativeObfuscation_sharedLibraryPresent()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Expected exactly one native library entry `neko/native/libneko_linux_x64.so` in /mnt/d/Code/Security/NekoObfuscator/worktree/dev-impl/neko-test/build/test-native/obfusjack-native.jar but found 0 entries: [META-INF/MANIFEST.MF, META-INF/services/org.example.features.DemoService, dev/nekoobfuscator/runtime/NekoNativeLoader.class, org/example/Main$1.class, org/example/Main$1Local.class, org/example/Main$2.class, org/example/Main$Animal.class, org/example/Main$Box.class, org/example/Main$Circle.class, org/example/Main$CloneThing.class, org/example/Main$Color.class, org/example/Main$DemoAnno.class, org/example/Main$Dog.class, org/example/Main$Greeter.class, org/example/Main$Inner.class, org/example/Main$LabeledPoint.class, org/example/Main$MyException.class, org/example/Main$Point.class, org/example/Main$Rectangle.class, org/example/Main$Shape.class, org/example/Main$StaticInner.class, org/example/Main$ThrowingRunnable.class, org/example/Main$Triangle.class, org/example/Main.class] ==> expected: <1> but was: <0>
